task_completion.description: Verify successful login to the OSCAR EMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard or schedule screen is visible, indicating the agent successfully logged in using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the chart for patient Oliver Twist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eChart or patient summary screen for 'Oliver Twist' is open and visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the existing signed encounter note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The encounter note editor, view, or addendum interface is open, displaying the original text: 'Subjective: c/o epigastric pain. Objective: Mild tenderness.'

task_completion.description: Verify the correct addendum text was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Plan: Patient advised to avoid spicy foods and take antacids prn.' is visible in the note's text area or addendum input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the original note text was preserved alongside the new addendum.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both the original text ('Subjective: c/o epigastric pain. Objective: Mild tenderness.') and the new addendum text are visible together in the note, proving the original was not deleted or overwritten.

task_completion.description: Verify the updated note was saved or signed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The note editor is closed or shows a saved state, and the updated note containing both the original text and the addendum is visible in the patient's past encounters/notes list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to interact with the EMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is clicking through the OSCAR EMR web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the text was entered into the actual OSCAR EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text inputs happen within the OSCAR EMR eChart interface, not in a separate text editor, notepad, or a locally created HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database queries to modify the note.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows visible executing SQL commands (e.g., UPDATE or INSERT statements) against the OSCAR database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Oliver Twist. Original Note Text: 'Subjective: c/o epigastric pain. Objective: Mild tenderness.' Addendum Text: 'Plan: Patient advised to avoid spicy foods and take antacids prn.' Credentials: oscardoc / oscar / PIN: 1117.
